summary: Inline spec viewer verified across rendering, empty-state, overflow handling, step numbering, and design-system compliance.

scenarios.name: Spec section appears as Step 6 between feedback and build summary
Spec markdown renders correctly with headings, lists, and code blocks
Empty-state message shown when spec.md is unavailable
Long spec content is scrollable within max-height container
Subsequent steps are renumbered correctly (Step 7, 8, etc.)
All CSS references design-system tokens only
Existing page sections render without regressions

notes: Validation performed against the live day detail page with both populated and missing spec.md scenarios.
